programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast: Reform UK
programme.desc: A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of Reform UK.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programme.desc: Alison returns to Battersea Dogs and Cats Home where she meets a premature Frenchie pup who needs help socialising and befriends a heartbroken Retriever cross.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain has to face his fears. Moira opens up to Chas. Pollard has a word with Cain.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jodie comes to the rescue when her dodgy past catches up with Shona. But when Shona reveals a betrayal of her own, Jodie targets David in a bid to break up her sister's marriage.

programme.title: A Taste for Murder
programme.desc: Crime drama series set amidst the picturesque scenery of Italy. After the sudden death of his wife, a much-needed holiday for DCI Joe Mottram is interrupted by an urgent call.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Join Robert Peston for a late-night political magazine show featuring big interviews with the country's leading politicians, topical guests, and the best political gossip.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Nicki Shields presents highlights of the opening weekend of the 2026 British Touring Car Championship season from Donington Park.

programme.title: Gallagher PREM Unleashed
programme.desc: Action from Round 14 of fixtures in the Gallagher Prem, featuring Newcastle v Bristol, Harlequins v Sale, Saracens v Leicester, Northampton v Bath and Gloucester v Exeter.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Pet Stars: Can My Pet Pay My Bills? Tonight
programme.desc: ITV's Consumer Editor Chris Choi meets the pets and their owners striking it rich as they cash in on a booming billion-pound industry.

programme.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programme.desc: Josie and the team help Dan clear out and value a room of doom, full of his fiancee's stash of vintage treasures. Will their offer be big enough to tempt her to take the cash.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: A shock removal has the close reeling, and Graham asks the remaining households to form official alliances - but with only five remaining, one household will be left on the shelf.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Join the Loose Women panellists as they interview celebrity guests and discuss the day's most topical issues, from current affairs to celebrity gossip and the latest showbiz news.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Solihull plays host to the dealers' den. Henry Nicholls marches off with a military watch and Jan Keyne gets a lesson in profit making.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: A fast-paced game of words hosted by Adil Ray - trying to Lingo all the way to beat the reigning Lingo champions are friends Brad and Will and mother and daughter Helen and Esther.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Jacob from Hull, Bobbie from Dudley, Ewan from Bolton and Linda from Kent hope that they can beat a Chaser together and leave with thousands of pounds.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast: Green Party
programme.desc: A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of the Green Party.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Holiday Havoc: Where Should You Go
programme.desc: As rising costs and global turmoil create uncertainty, Charlotte Hawkins reports on what the changing holiday market means for your next getaway.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Todd plays manipulative games. Paddy hopes Simo can help.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After a clash with the Battersby sisters fails to gain Daniel's sympathy, Megan sets her sights on blackmailing Maggie over her late husband's demise, leading to a tense showdown.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: The neighbours face their biggest decision yet during alliance week. Graham asks them to pair up with another household, and true colours show when friendships are cast aside.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Intriguing crime action film starring Tom Cruise and Colin Farrell, 2002. A man who works with a police force that try to stop crimes before they happen is framed for a murder.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: The neighbours face their biggest decision yet during alliance week. Graham asks them to pair up with another household, and true colours show when friendships are cast aside.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Sir Stephen Fry faces the grilling of a lifetime from neurodivergent interviewers. Did he take drugs in Buckingham Palace? Is he happy to be alive? No question is off the table.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Newmarket
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live racing on the opening day of the Guineas meeting at Newmarket, alongside runs at Ascot and Goodwood.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: A look back at the game show's most thrilling end games as plucky players and famous faces alike take on the machine for its jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: All that stands between Roz from Glasgow, Mark from Trewellard, Tom from Nottingham, Kate from Penistone and thousands of pounds is the small matter of one of the Chasers.
